title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0127 6-8 Emery Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 5PF
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Permission  Applicant name:  Gary Palmer (Trustees of AMP Electrical Retirement Benefit Scheme)  Site address:  6-8 Emery Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 5PF  Description of proposed development:  Proposed 5No class B2 general industrial units  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 2 October 2025   Date by when representations must be made 5 November 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 27 November 2025   Decision date 26 November 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 359 KB, 5 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 5 November 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0127 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     9116-17127-C - Proposed plans and elevations Unit 5  (PDF, 332 KB, 1 page)  9116-17128  - Existing site plan  (PDF, 175 KB, 1 page)  9116-17129-C - Proposed site plan  (PDF, 253 KB, 1 page)  Arboricultural Report - Emery Road  (PDF, 3.96 MB, 16 pages)  BNG Statement and Exemption Statement - Emery Road  (PDF, 2.7 MB, 5 pages)  CIL Form 1 - Additional information  (PDF, 3.66 MB, 6 pages)  Coaling Mining Risk Assessment Report - B5271 Emery Rd  (PDF, 7.25 MB, 27 pages)  Contamination Report - 6-8 Emery Road  (PDF, 4.44 MB, 25 pages)  Covering letter  (PDF, 134 KB, 1 page)  Loction plan - Emery Road  (PDF, 678 KB, 1 page)  Outline Drainage Strategy - 10830ERB(D) - Emery Road  (PDF, 9.85 MB, 38 pages)  Planning application form...
